alternative_parents.description: Triorganotin compounds where the tin atom is linked to exactly three alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Trialkyltins

alternative_parents.description: Organometallic compounds with the generic formula R-M-X, where R is an alkyl group, and X is a metal atom.
alternative_parents.name: Metal alkyl halides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metal atom in its ionic form.
class.name: Organic metal salts

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as triorganotin halide salts. These are organic compounds containing a tin atom bonded to three carbon atoms and a halogen atom.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a tin atom bonded to three carbon atoms and a halogen atom.
direct_parent.name: Triorganotin halide salts

intermediate_nodes.description: Organic salt compounds containing a tin atom in its ionic form.
intermediate_nodes.name: Organic tin salts

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic salt compounds containing a post-transition metal atom in its ionic form.
subclass.name: Organic post-transition metal salts

superclass.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
superclass.name: Organic salts
